description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test suite that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow consists of three jobs: pyright, test, and coveralls. The pyright job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.x, caches pip dependencies, installs dependencies, and runs pyright. The test job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with various Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs pytest with coverage, and uploads coverage to Coveralls. The coveralls job runs on ubuntu-latest, finishes the Coveralls workflow, and uploads the final coverage report.
